description_long: This ottoman features a rectangular, low-profile cushion upholstered in a smooth, dark gray material, likely faux leather or vinyl. The cushion is thick and appears to be well-padded, providing a comfortable surface for sitting or resting feet. The ottoman is supported by four short, sturdy legs, each equipped with small casters for easy mobility. The legs are dark in color and have a simple, straight design, blending seamlessly with the overall modern aesthetic. There is no visible tufting or decorative trim on the cushion, giving the ottoman a clean and minimalist appearance. The surface is unadorned, with a solid color and no discernible pattern.
description: A modern, rectangular ottoman with a smooth, dark gray cushion and four short legs on casters, featuring a minimalist design with no visible trim or tufting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular cushion and two front legs with casters, highlighting the ottoman's low profile.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the square shape and the straight, simple design of the legs with casters.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the back edge of the cushion and the rear legs with casters.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the square profile and the unobtrusive legs with casters.
